Diary of a Mad Black Woman (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $50,406,346Details
International Box Office $52,010
Worldwide Box Office $50,458,356
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,905,089 (43.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$5,500,000 (worldwide box office is 9.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,483 opening theaters/1,703 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $94,049,912

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 25th, 2005 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: June 28th, 2005 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for drug content, thematic elements, crude sexual references and some violence.
Running Time: 116 minutes
Franchise: Madea Cinematic Universe
Cast, crew, or production detail: Fat Suit, Same Actor, Multiple Roles, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: African Americans, Cross-Dressing, House Arrest, Relationships Gone Wrong
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Based on Play
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
